allow: Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc 'ls ~/.nvm 2>/dev/null | head -3; which nvm fnm volta 2>/dev/null; ls /usr/local/bin 2>/dev/null | grep -i node; apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep -i nodejs | head -3; cat /etc/os-release | head -2')
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -c 'export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm ls 2>/dev/null; node --version 2>/dev/null; npm --version 2>/dev/null')
